description: Read-only behavioral diagnostic of all mode scores for weather-exposed necessary activities of middle-aged and elderly Agents.
scope_notes: The diagnostic changes no behavior relative to the joint candidate scenario.
It writes every final choice-set option and utility component for W1/W2 exposed travel-required necessary activities.
Low ride-hailing share is not treated as a defect unless the audit identifies an access, affordability, timing or supply barrier.
